description_long: This object consists of a group of various low-lying shrubs and small leafy plants, each with distinct foliage shapes and densities. The plants display a range of leaf arrangements, from rosettes of long, narrow leaves to clusters of rounded or slightly lobed leaves. The coloration is predominantly green, with some leaves exhibiting lighter or yellowish-green tones, suggesting a mix of species or cultivars. The shrubs are arranged in a loose, naturalistic cluster, typical of urban landscaping or park settings. There are no visible flowers or fruits, and the overall height of the plants is relatively low, making them suitable for ground cover or border planting. The texture appears soft and leafy, with a matte finish and moderate surface roughness.
description: A diverse cluster of low, leafy shrubs with varying leaf shapes and green hues, arranged as ground cover or border plants. The foliage is dense and soft, with no visible flowers.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the full spread of the shrubs, highlighting the variety in leaf shapes and the dense, layered arrangement.
description_view_1: A side-angled view emphasizing the depth and staggered placement of the shrubs, with the taller plants at the back and shorter ones in front.
description_view_2: A rear view displaying the backs of the shrubs, with the leaf textures and overall width of the cluster more apparent.
description_view_3: A top-down view revealing the circular and rosette patterns of the foliage, and the spatial distribution of the different shrub types.
